todos.description: Review .goreleaser.yml config: binary name, archives template, checksums, nfpm, brew, changelog
todos.note: Config is correct and complete. Binary name: agnostic. GoOS: linux, GoArch: amd64+arm64. Archives: tar.gz. Checksums: checksums.txt. nfpm: deb+rpm. Brew: homebrew-tap. Changelog: github-native. No edits needed.

todos.description: Create and push git tag v0.1.0 to trigger release workflow
todos.note: Cannot execute git tag/push in this sandbox environment. Run the following commands manually: git tag v0.1.0 && git push origin v0.1.0

todos.description: Verify GoReleaser workflow triggers and completes successfully in GitHub Actions
todos.note: After tag v0.1.0 is pushed, go to https://github.com/ElioNeto/agnostikos/actions and verify the 'Release' workflow triggers and completes successfully. Check that goreleaser runs without errors and publishes the release.

todos.description: Validate release artifacts: binaries for linux/amd64 and linux/arm64, and checksums.txt on GitHub Releases page
todos.note: After workflow completes, go to https://github.com/ElioNeto/agnostikos/releases/tag/v0.1.0 and verify: agnostikos_0.1.0_linux_amd64.tar.gz, agnostikos_0.1.0_linux_arm64.tar.gz, checksums.txt. Also verify nfpm packages (.deb/.rpm) are attached if applicable.
